title: IMPACT by Amir Shpilman
description: Engraving and computer-assisted orchestration for a new opera featuring orchestra and two stuntwomen. Developed a custom Sibelius plugin to systematically orchestrate and notate material in real-time, streamlining production.

title: choir work by Amir Shpilman
description: Engraving and computer-assisted orchestration for a new opera featuring orchestra and two stuntwomen. Developed a custom Sibelius plugin to systematically orchestrate and notate material in real-time, streamlining production.

title: "Kriat Shema" by Amir Shpilman
description: Score and parts preparation for a new orchestral piece, "Kriat Shema - Fantasy for Shofar and Orchestra," premiered by the Berlin Philharmonic.

title: Custom Sibelius® Plugins
description: Development of various plugins for Sibelius to enhance workflow, including layout importation, text manipulation, hairpin correction, microtonal accidental insertion (HEJI), and specialized tools for composers like Laure M. Hiendl.
